nasb.text: His heart is upheld, he will not fear, Until he looks with satisfaction on his adversaries.

esv.text: His heart is steady; he will not be afraid, until he looks in triumph on his adversaries.

cnv.text: 他的心堅決，毫不懼怕， 直到他看見他的敵人遭報。

ccb.text: 他心里镇定自若，毫不害怕， 他终必战胜仇敌。

csbs.text: 他的心坚定，总不害怕， 直到看见敌人的下场。
